case_title: JEANINE AREAS et al VS. ESPERANZA BARRIOS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-21-2014 CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-02-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AREAS, JEANINE DELAO, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, ESPERANZA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-21-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-28-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-21-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
